prompt: Do a deep investigation of YEMANITY s.r.o. (ICO 55002072). This is a young company (founded 2022) with 892K EUR in CRZ contracts, registered as a business consulting firm but winning construction contracts. Run Phases 1-2 only (contract mapping + hidden entity expansion). Do NOT use browser automation (no RPVS, no foaf.sk, no UVO).

assertions.name: maps_all_contracts
assertions.text: Queries all CRZ contracts for ICO 55002072, showing contract names, buyers, amounts, and dates

assertions.name: extracts_red_flags
assertions.text: Queries red_flags table for YEMANITY's contracts, showing flag types and severities

assertions.name: checks_hidden_entities
assertions.text: Queries extractions table for hidden entities in YEMANITY's contracts

assertions.name: identifies_framework
assertions.text: Checks if contracts share naming patterns and queries related framework contracts

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.text: Output follows the deep investigation report template in Slovak with zlte stopy tables
